context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly diagnoses the global-filter scoping issue and produces a fixed base that uses view-level filters for status while keeping the tag constraint global.

checklist.name: Explains global filter applies to all views
checklist.description: The response explains that the top-level filters block restricts every view in the base, so the status != "archived" condition prevents the Archived view from ever matching any notes.

checklist.name: Global filter retains only the tag scope
checklist.description: The corrected global filters block contains only the tag constraint (file.hasTag("project") or equivalent) and does not include any status-based exclusion.

checklist.name: Active view has view-level filter for active status
checklist.description: The "Active" view contains a view-level filters clause that matches status == "active" (or equivalent).

checklist.name: Archived view has view-level filter for archived status
checklist.description: The "Archived" view contains a view-level filters clause that matches status == "archived" (or equivalent).

checklist.name: Valid YAML structure
checklist.description: The corrected file is syntactically valid YAML with no unquoted special characters and consistent indentation.
